# Generated by tools/generate_stellar_ai_subject_agreements.py.
# Full-object, hash-locked copies from common/agreement_presets/02_agreement_presets_ai_bulwark.txt.
# Only evaluator-side overlord_weight/subject_weight identity preferences are added.
# Terms, potential, acceptance, Nomad exclusions, and negative subject weights remain parent-owned.

@protectorate_tech_threshold = 0.4
@specialist_aligned_ethics_value = 100
@specialist_unaligned_ethics_value = -50

# source_object_sha256 = 1d0b371bb1bd30b2f96abd800f20ee93478ddddb2c7d1515e2505d6c65d5e8d8
preset_bulwark_nice_01 = {
	parent = preset_bulwark
	specialist_type = specialist_bulwark
	hidden = yes
	term_data = {
		discrete_terms = {
			{
				key = specialist_type
				value = specialist_bulwark
			}
			{
				key = subject_integration
				value = subject_can_not_be_integrated
			}
			{
				key = subject_diplomacy
				value = subject_can_do_diplomacy
			}
			{
				key = subject_expand
				value = subject_can_expand
			}
			{
				key = joins_overlord_wars
				value = joins_overlord_wars_defensive
			}
			{
				key = joins_subject_wars
				value = joins_subject_wars_defensive
			}
			{
				key = subject_holdings_limit
				value = subject_holdings_limit_1
			}
			{
				key = subject_loyalty
				value = subject_loyalty_effects
			}
			{
				key = protectorate
				value = subject_is_not_protectorate
			}
		}
	}

	overlord_weight = {
		base = 75
		modifier = {
			add = @specialist_aligned_ethics_value
			is_militarist = yes
		}
		modifier = {
			factor = 0.5
			has_specialist_subject_type = { TYPE = bulwark }
			NOT = { FROM = { is_specialist_subject_type = { TYPE = bulwark } } }
		}
		modifier = {
			factor = 1.5
			FROM = { is_specialist_subject_type = { TYPE = bulwark } }
		}
		modifier = {
			factor = 1.2
			num_rivals > 0
		}
		modifier = {
			add = @specialist_unaligned_ethics_value
			is_pacifist = yes
		}
		modifier = { factor = 1.15 staid_archetype_defensive = yes staid_archetype_identity_conflict = no staid_archetype_eligible_country = yes staid_basic_economy_runway_safe = yes staid_survival_mode = no staid_recovery_mode = no staid_catastrophic_collapse_mode = no staid_core_deficit_short_runway = no }
		modifier = { factor = 1.05 staid_archetype_lead_secondary_defensive = yes staid_archetype_identity_conflict = no staid_archetype_eligible_country = yes staid_basic_economy_runway_safe = yes staid_survival_mode = no staid_recovery_mode = no staid_catastrophic_collapse_mode = no staid_core_deficit_short_runway = no }
	}

	subject_weight = {
		base = 50
		modifier = {
			add = @specialist_aligned_ethics_value
			is_militarist = yes
		}
		modifier = {
			add = @specialist_unaligned_ethics_value
			is_pacifist = yes
		}

		modifier = { factor = 1.15 staid_archetype_defensive = yes staid_archetype_identity_conflict = no staid_archetype_eligible_country = yes staid_basic_economy_runway_safe = yes staid_survival_mode = no staid_recovery_mode = no staid_catastrophic_collapse_mode = no staid_core_deficit_short_runway = no }
		modifier = { factor = 1.05 staid_archetype_lead_secondary_defensive = yes staid_archetype_identity_conflict = no staid_archetype_eligible_country = yes staid_basic_economy_runway_safe = yes staid_survival_mode = no staid_recovery_mode = no staid_catastrophic_collapse_mode = no staid_core_deficit_short_runway = no }
	}

	potential = {
		has_overlord_dlc = yes
		NOR = {
			is_nomadic = yes
			has_civic = civic_inwards_perfection
			FROM = { has_civic = civic_inwards_perfection }
		}
		OR = {
			FROM = { has_origin = origin_imperial_vassal_overlord }
			is_specialist_subject_type = { TYPE = bulwark }
			tech_unlocked_ratio = {
				who = from
				ratio >= @protectorate_tech_threshold
			}
		}
		FROM = { is_nomadic = no }
		is_nomadic = no
	}
}

				key = subject_loyalty
				value = subject_loyalty_effects
			}
			{
				key = protectorate
				value = subject_is_not_protectorate
			}
		}
	}

		base = 50

			FROM = { is_specialist_subject_type = { TYPE = bulwark } }
		}

			factor = 1.2
			num_rivals > 0

			add = @specialist_unaligned_ethics_value
			is_pacifist = yes

preset_bulwark_mean_01 = {
	parent = preset_bulwark
	specialist_type = specialist_bulwark
	hidden = yes
	term_data = {
		discrete_terms = {
			{
				key = specialist_type
				value = specialist_bulwark
			}
			{
				key = subject_integration
				value = subject_can_not_be_integrated
			}
			{
				key = subject_diplomacy
				value = subject_can_do_diplomacy_but_not_vote
			}
			{
				key = subject_expand
				value = subject_can_expand_with_tithe
			}
			{
				key = joins_overlord_wars
				value = joins_overlord_wars_all
			}
			{
				key = joins_subject_wars
				value = joins_subject_wars_defensive
			}
			{
				key = subject_holdings_limit
				value = subject_holdings_limit_2
			}
			{
				key = subject_loyalty
				value = subject_loyalty_effects
			}
			{
				key = protectorate
				value = subject_is_not_protectorate
			}
		}
	}

	overlord_weight = {
		base = 125
		modifier = {
			add = @specialist_aligned_ethics_value
			is_militarist = yes
		}
		modifier = {
			factor = 0.5
			has_specialist_subject_type = { TYPE = bulwark }
			NOT = { FROM = { is_specialist_subject_type = { TYPE = bulwark } } }
		}
		modifier = {
			factor = 1.5
			FROM = { is_specialist_subject_type = { TYPE = bulwark } }
		}
		modifier = {
			factor = 1.2
			num_rivals > 0
		}
		modifier = {
			add = @specialist_unaligned_ethics_value
			is_pacifist = yes
		}
		modifier = { factor = 1.15 staid_archetype_defensive = yes staid_archetype_identity_conflict = no staid_archetype_eligible_country = yes staid_basic_economy_runway_safe = yes staid_survival_mode = no staid_recovery_mode = no staid_catastrophic_collapse_mode = no staid_core_deficit_short_runway = no }
		modifier = { factor = 1.05 staid_archetype_lead_secondary_defensive = yes staid_archetype_identity_conflict = no staid_archetype_eligible_country = yes staid_basic_economy_runway_safe = yes staid_survival_mode = no staid_recovery_mode = no staid_catastrophic_collapse_mode = no staid_core_deficit_short_runway = no }
	}

	subject_weight = {
		base = -100
		modifier = {
			add = @specialist_aligned_ethics_value
			is_militarist = yes
		}
		modifier = {
			add = @specialist_unaligned_ethics_value
			is_pacifist = yes
		}

	}

	potential = {
		has_overlord_dlc = yes
		NOR = {

			FROM = { has_civic = civic_inwards_perfection }

preset_bulwark_mean_02 = {
	parent = preset_bulwark
	specialist_type = specialist_bulwark
	hidden = yes
	term_data = {
		discrete_terms = {
			{
				key = specialist_type
				value = specialist_bulwark
			}
			{
				key = subject_integration
				value = subject_can_not_be_integrated
			}
			{
				key = subject_diplomacy
				value = subject_can_do_diplomacy_but_not_vote
			}
			{
				key = subject_expand
				value = subject_can_expand_with_tithe
			}
			{
				key = joins_overlord_wars
				value = joins_overlord_wars_all
			}
			{
				key = joins_subject_wars
				value = joins_subject_wars_none
			}
			{
				key = subject_holdings_limit
				value = subject_holdings_limit_2
			}
			{
				key = subject_loyalty
				value = subject_loyalty_effects
			}
			{
				key = protectorate
				value = subject_is_not_protectorate
			}
		}
	}

	overlord_weight = {
		base = 150
		modifier = {
			add = @specialist_aligned_ethics_value
			is_militarist = yes
		}
		modifier = {
			factor = 0.5
			has_specialist_subject_type = { TYPE = bulwark }
			NOT = { FROM = { is_specialist_subject_type = { TYPE = bulwark } } }
		}
		modifier = {
			factor = 1.5
			FROM = { is_specialist_subject_type = { TYPE = bulwark } }
		}
		modifier = {
			factor = 1.2
			num_rivals > 0
		}
		modifier = {
			add = @specialist_unaligned_ethics_value
			is_pacifist = yes
		}
		modifier = { factor = 1.15 staid_archetype_defensive = yes staid_archetype_identity_conflict = no staid_archetype_eligible_country = yes staid_basic_economy_runway_safe = yes staid_survival_mode = no staid_recovery_mode = no staid_catastrophic_collapse_mode = no staid_core_deficit_short_runway = no }
		modifier = { factor = 1.05 staid_archetype_lead_secondary_defensive = yes staid_archetype_identity_conflict = no staid_archetype_eligible_country = yes staid_basic_economy_runway_safe = yes staid_survival_mode = no staid_recovery_mode = no staid_catastrophic_collapse_mode = no staid_core_deficit_short_runway = no }
	}

	subject_weight = {
		base = -250
		modifier = {
			add = @specialist_aligned_ethics_value
			is_militarist = yes
		}
		modifier = {
			add = @specialist_unaligned_ethics_value
			is_pacifist = yes
		}

	}

	potential = {
		has_overlord_dlc = yes
		NOR = {
			is_nomadic = yes
			has_civic = civic_inwards_perfection
			FROM = { has_civic = civic_inwards_perfection }
		}
		OR = {
			FROM = { has_origin = origin_imperial_vassal_overlord }
			is_specialist_subject_type = { TYPE = bulwark }
			tech_unlocked_ratio = {
				who = from
				ratio >= @protectorate_tech_threshold
			}
		}

		is_nomadic = no

preset_bulwark_mean_03 = {
	parent = preset_bulwark
	specialist_type = specialist_bulwark
	hidden = yes
	term_data = {
		discrete_terms = {
			{
				key = specialist_type
				value = specialist_bulwark
			}
			{
				key = subject_integration
				value = subject_can_not_be_integrated
			}
			{
				key = subject_diplomacy
				value = subject_can_do_diplomacy_but_not_vote
			}
			{
				key = subject_expand
				value = subject_can_expand_with_tithe
			}
			{
				key = joins_overlord_wars
				value = joins_overlord_wars_all
			}
			{
				key = joins_subject_wars
				value = joins_subject_wars_none
			}
			{
				key = subject_holdings_limit
				value = subject_holdings_limit_4
			}
			{
				key = subject_loyalty
				value = subject_loyalty_effects
			}
			{
				key = protectorate
				value = subject_is_not_protectorate
			}
		}
	}

	overlord_weight = {
		base = 175
		modifier = {
			add = @specialist_aligned_ethics_value
			is_militarist = yes
		}
		modifier = {
			factor = 0.5
			has_specialist_subject_type = { TYPE = bulwark }
			NOT = { FROM = { is_specialist_subject_type = { TYPE = bulwark } } }
		}
		modifier = {
			factor = 1.5
			FROM = { is_specialist_subject_type = { TYPE = bulwark } }
		}
		modifier = {
			factor = 1.2
			num_rivals > 0
		}
		modifier = {
			add = @specialist_unaligned_ethics_value
			is_pacifist = yes
		}
		modifier = { factor = 1.15 staid_archetype_defensive = yes staid_archetype_identity_conflict = no staid_archetype_eligible_country = yes staid_basic_economy_runway_safe = yes staid_survival_mode = no staid_recovery_mode = no staid_catastrophic_collapse_mode = no staid_core_deficit_short_runway = no }
		modifier = { factor = 1.05 staid_archetype_lead_secondary_defensive = yes staid_archetype_identity_conflict = no staid_archetype_eligible_country = yes staid_basic_economy_runway_safe = yes staid_survival_mode = no staid_recovery_mode = no staid_catastrophic_collapse_mode = no staid_core_deficit_short_runway = no }
	}

	subject_weight = {
		base = -500
		modifier = {
			add = @specialist_aligned_ethics_value
			is_militarist = yes
		}
		modifier = {
			add = @specialist_unaligned_ethics_value
			is_pacifist = yes
		}

	}

	potential = {
		has_overlord_dlc = yes
		NOR = {
			is_nomadic = yes
			has_civic = civic_inwards_perfection
			FROM = { has_civic = civic_inwards_perfection }
		}
		OR = {
			FROM = { has_origin = origin_imperial_vassal_overlord }
			is_specialist_subject_type = { TYPE = bulwark }
			tech_unlocked_ratio = {
				who = from
				ratio >= @protectorate_tech_threshold
			}
		}
		FROM = { is_nomadic = no }
		is_nomadic = no
	}
